jobText: Melbourne, Australia ::: None  <><><><>  Join a movement in which everyone can win. We started a movement in which everyone can win – shoppers, retailers, society and every person on our team. To play fair, trust people and reward them for doing the right thing. We see and feel the impact of our work as more and more people gain financial freedom and retailers grow across the globe. Founded in 2014, in Sydney, Australia, Afterpay has over 11 million active customers globally and more than 64,000 of the world's best retailers around the world including Anthropologie, Revolve, DSW, GOAT, Finish Line, Levi's, Mac Cosmetics, Ray-Ban and many others. Afterpay is on a mission to power an economy in which everyone wins. Afterpay is completely free for customers who pay on time – helping people spend responsibly without incurring interest, fees or extended debt. Afterpay empowers customers to access the things they want and need, while still allowing them to maintain financial wellness and control, by splitting payments in four, for both online and in-store purchases. Afterpay is deeply committed to delivering positive outcomes for customers. We are focused on supporting our community of shoppers. We trust in the next generation and share a vision of a more accessible and sustainable world in which people are rewarded for doing the right thing. The Role Block is building the next generation of commerce experiences for merchants and PSPs through Afterpay. As part of Block's Solutions Engineering team, you will be a senior technical leader driving complex partner and merchant integrations. You'll work directly with Sales, Partnerships, and Product teams to deeply understand customer needs, showcase our APIs and services, and solve challenging technical problems that accelerate adoption. We are looking for an engineer with sales acumen, a thoughtful product intuition and an entrepreneurial spirit. This is a senior individual contributor role - ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of technology and commerce, has hands-on software engineering experience,and can represent Afterpay's technical vision to global enterprise merchants and partners while influencing product direction internally. You Will Partner with Sales, Relationship Management, Partnerships to support developers integrating with our platform Design and deliver technical solutions, including building proof-of-concepts, custom reports, sample integrations, and troubleshooting complex issues. Act as a trusted technical advisor - translating business requirements into scalable integration approaches and advocating for best practices. Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to surface customer feedback and influence the roadmap. Create and deliver compelling demos, presentations, and technical deep dives for both executive and engineering stakeholders. Communicate product features, updates, and technical guidance clearly across internal teams and external customers. You Have 8+ years of experience in technical customer-facing roles (partner engineering, solutions architecture, sales engineering), working with enterprise merchants or global partners. Deep hands-on technical expertise – comfortable building with APIs, debugging integrations, and guiding developers through complex implementations. Prior professional experience with full-stack development and proficiency in at least one programming language, with the ability to rapidly learn new tools and technologies. Strong communication skills, with the ability to bridge technical and non-technical audiences and influence senior stakeholders. Proven success leading technical projects or initiatives end-to-end in globally distributed, multicultural teams. A strong understanding of payments, fintech, or commerce platforms. Experience presenting to technical and executive audiences in both structured and impromptu settings. A willingness to travel for onsite client meetings (10-20%) Additional languages (ie Mandarin) is a plus We're working to build a more inclusive economy where our customers have equal access to opportunity, and we strive to live by these same values in building our workplace. Block is a proud equal opportunity employer. We work hard to evaluate all employees and job applicants consistently, without regard to identity or other legally protected class. We believe in being fair, and are committed to an inclusive interview experience, including providing reasonable accommodations to disabled applicants throughout the recruitment process. We encourage applicants to share any needed accommodations with their recruiter, who will treat these requests as confidentially as possible. Want to learn more about what we're doing to build a workplace that is fair and square? Check out our I+D page. Block is a globally distributed company and this role will require working with other employees in multiple time zones. You may be required to perform work outside of normal business as part of this role. Application Guidelines Candidates may submit up to 9 active applications within a 60-day period. Reapplications to the same role are accepted 90 days after a previous application has been reviewed. Use of AI in Our Hiring Process We may use automated AI tools to evaluate job applications for efficiency and consistency. These tools comply with local regulations, including bias audits, and we handle all personal data in accordance with state and local privacy laws. Contact us here with hiring practice or data usage questions. Every benefit we offer is designed with one goal: empowering you to do the best work of your career while building the life you want. Remote work, medical insurance, flexible time off, retirement savings plans, and modern family planning are just some of our offering. Check out our other benefits at Block. Block, Inc. Bay Area, CA, US ::: None  <><><><>  Proto is accelerating the world's transition to an open economy with products that increase access and independence for everyone. We're building Bitkey, a simple and safe self-custody bitcoin wallet that will put customers in control, as well as hardware and software that will help decentralize bitcoin mining and enable new and innovative use cases for bitcoin mining. We're developing these products in the open - you can read more about them at bitkey.build and mining.build. Within Proto, our Bitcoin Products team delivers the product and go-to-market strategy, software, firmware, and custom silicon needed to make Bitkey and our ambitious mining initiatives a reality. Come build the future of money with us! The Role The Proto software team is responsible for prototyping, designing, and delivering software applications to support Block's state-of-the-art custom Bitcoin mining chip. We work closely with the ASIC and Electrical Engineering teams to redefine what Bitcoin mining looks like. The candidate will be responsible for all aspects of software development, which includes building, testing, and deploying on both bare metal embedded and Linux environments. You will: Develop and maintain cloud hosted observability platform for deployed devices Maintain well structured defect documentation and system status reporting using observability platform Support the development and maintenance of embedded software and tooling Conduct in-bound issue triage for bug reports and hardware field failures Implement tests or detection methods for new failure modes Collaborate with the team to help develop features and resolve production issues Conduct ongoing reliability and performance testing to qualify software releases to customers and to manufacturing Organize customer impact assessments for field defects and software bugs in production Partner with stakeholders to ensure technical execution meets expectations You have: 6+ years of relevant professional experience. Experience using Python or Go for automated testing, build systems, and/or systems integration Experience developing internal web apps with Javascript/Typescript and SQL Basic proficiency in C, C++, or Rust Experience triaging production bugs and/or field defects on hardware products Experience with metrics, monitoring, logging, and alerting platforms (e.g. Grafana, Splunk, DataDog, Elastic platforms) Experience with embedded systems, knowledge of operating systems, familiarity with software development tools, understanding of hardware-software interfaces Experience developing or maintaining Linux services or applications Nice to have: Knowledge of Bitcoin mining Experience conducting preliminary root cause analysis using a multimeter, logic analyzer, and/or firmware tests Experience developing or supporting electronics or IoT products Understanding of common communications protocols (e.g. Ethernet, SPI, UART, I2C, USB), debugging practices (e.g. JTAG and associated GDB integrations), and basic electrical design knowledge Degree in CS, CE, EE, or equivalent practical experience We're working to build a more inclusive economy where our customers have equal access to opportunity, and we strive to live by these same values in building our workplace. Bay Area, CA, US ::: None  <><><><>  As the Head of Bitcoin Engineering, you will be responsible for leading and growing the engineering organization responsible for all of Block’s bitcoin-based products and will report directly to Block’s overall head of engineering. This leader will be responsible for guiding a large, distributed team of engineers and managers delivering trusted, scalable, and compliant systems that make Bitcoin accessible to millions of people and businesses globally. You Will: Lead the engineering organization powering all Bitcoin-related initiatives across Block’s ecosystems. Define the technical vision and roadmap for Bitcoin integration across payments, custody, and self-custody products, aligning with Block’s broader mission of economic empowerment. Partner with the CashApp and Square team to deliver Bitcoin related features, product and services. Build upon Block’s position as one of the largest operators on the Lightning Network, enabling low-cost, real-time Bitcoin transactions for millions of users. Drive innovation in secure custody solutions, AI-driven payment intelligence, stablecoin interoperability, and decentralized identity (DID) frameworks. Partner closely with product, compliance, and security teams to ensure the safe and compliant expansion of Bitcoin features across regulated markets. Champion scalability, resilience, and availability across systems handling billions in digital assets and payments. Build and nurture a world-class engineering culture grounded in technical excellence, open collaboration, and accountability. Serve as a public-facing technical ambassador, representing Block’s Bitcoin work across the open-source, crypto, and engineering communities. You Have: 15+ years of experience in technology, including extensive leadership of large, distributed engineering teams. Demonstrated excellence in cross-team collaboration, with experience building systems and relationships that align large, distributed teams and accelerate decision-making. Deep technical understanding of Bitcoin, blockchain protocols, cryptography, and financial infrastructure systems. Proven track record of delivering consumer-scale financial or crypto products used by millions globally. Experience architecting institutional-grade custody or wallet systems safeguarding billions in assets. Demonstrated ability to lead organizations spanning multiple geographies and time zones. A thought leader in the Bitcoin and crypto ecosystems, engaged in the ongoing evolution of decentralized financial technology. Strong executive presence and ability to influence technical and strategic decisions at the highest level. Familiarity with the unique regulatory, reliability, and trust challenges associated with serving both banked and underbanked populations. Preferred: Experience in fintech, payments, or crypto infrastructure at scale. Prior involvement in open-source Bitcoin or Lightning development. Deep interest in emerging innovations such as AI-powered agents, stablecoin settlement, and decentralized identity. Bay Area, CA, US ::: None  <><><><>  Block is one company built from many blocks, all united by the same purpose of economic empowerment. The blocks that form our foundational teams — People, Finance, Counsel, Hardware, Information Security, Platform Infrastructure Engineering, and more — provide support and guidance at the corporate level. They work across business groups and around the globe, spanning time zones and disciplines to develop inclusive People policies, forecast finances, give legal counsel, safeguard systems, nurture new initiatives, and more. Every challenge creates possibilities, and we need different perspectives to see them all. Bring yours to Block. The Role Bitkey is Block's Bitcoin self-custody wallet, built to make it safe and approachable for people everywhere to hold their own Bitcoin. Our team builds end-to-end product experiences — from backend services and APIs to public-facing web surfaces and in-product flows — that help customers discover Bitkey, purchase a device, and manage their funds with confidence. We're looking for a full-stack Software Engineer to help build and evolve Bitkey's customer-facing surfaces. This role spans public web experiences, purchase and checkout flows, and in-product web and service-backed experiences that support the Bitkey ecosystem. You'll design and operate the backend systems that power these experiences, while also contributing to the web interfaces customers interact with. This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys owning customer journeys end-to-end, from service design and data modeling to web-based user experiences, and who is comfortable working close to revenue-impacting systems. techniques. You Will Design, build, and maintain backend services and APIs that support Bitkey's public website, purchase flows, and customer-facing products. Build and evolve web-based experiences, including product/marketing surfaces and checkout flows. Partner closely with product, design, and growth teams to improve conversion, reliability, and user experience across the Bitkey funnel. Own features end-to-end, from backend logic and data models through frontend workflows and integrations. Collaborate with mobile/platform teams and design technologists to ensure web and service-backed flows integrate cleanly into the broader Bitkey experience. Help improve system reliability, observability, and operational maturity for customer- and revenue-facing systems. Contribute to architectural discussions around service boundaries, scalability, and long-term maintainability. Leverage AI-powered development tools to accelerate iteration, improve code quality, and explore new ways of working across the stack. Actively contribute ideas and experimentation around engineering practices, tooling, and team workflows, with a bias toward continuous improvement. You Have 5+ years relevant industry experience building and operating backend systems in production, particularly APIs and services that support customer-facing applications. Solid full-stack experience, with the ability to contribute to modern web front-ends (e.g., React or similar frameworks). A strong backend skill set: comfort with data modeling, service design, and operational ownership. Experience collaborating closely with product managers, designers, and cross-functional partners. Strong engineering fundamentals, including testing, debugging, and performance tuning. Comfort learning new technologies and product domains as needed. Nice to Have Experience working on public websites, growth funnels, or marketing surfaces. Familiarity with Kotlin, Rust, or similar strongly typed languages. Experience contributing to mobile applications (Android or iOS). Interest in Bitcoin, financial products, or consumer fintech. Experience improving developer tooling, observability, or internal platforms.
